user.title: Connect NVT to the API
user.description: Enter the API URL, then choose which network this NVT monitor should use.

stop.title: Select stop
stop.description: Choose the stop first. NVT will then only show lines currently served by that stop.

line.title: Select line
line.description: Only lines currently served by the selected stop are shown here, with their type and colors when available.

direction.title: Select direction
direction.description: Choose the direction or terminus to monitor for the selected line.

error.invalid_response: The API returned an unexpected response.
error.no_lines: No lines were returned by the API.
error.no_lines_at_stop: No lines are currently available for the selected stop.
error.no_stop_groups: No stop groups were returned by the API.
